channel.title: NPR Topics: National
channel.description: NPR coverage of national news, U.S. politics, elections, business, arts, culture, health and science, and technology. Subscribe to the NPR Nation RSS feed.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Louisiana Sen. Bill Cassidy loses in Republican primary, does not advance to runoff
item.description: Sen. Bill Cassidy is one of few remaining Republican senators who voted for President Trump's impeachment after the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. Trump endorsed his opponent, Rep. Julia Letlow.
item.content:encoded:
Sen. Bill Cassidy is one of few remaining Republican senators who voted for President Trump's impeachment after the Jan. 6 attack on the Capitol. Trump endorsed his opponent, Rep. Julia Letlow.

(Image credit: Annie Flanagan for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Sam Gringlas

item.title: Napoleon Solo holds off Iron Honor to win the Preakness
item.description: It's the colt's first victory of the year. Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo's exit from the race left the field of 14 horses wide open to contest the middle jewel of the Triple Crown.
item.content:encoded:
It's the colt's first victory of the year. Kentucky Derby winner Golden Tempo's exit from the race left the field of 14 horses wide open to contest the middle jewel of the Triple Crown.

(Image credit: Nick Wass)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Reporter's Notebook: producing a great interview
item.description: The team behind NPR's Wild Card explains how careful preparation helps them produce interviews that reveal deep and surprising human moments.
item.content:encoded: The team behind NPR's Wild Card explains how careful preparation helps them produce interviews that reveal deep and surprising human moments.
item.dc:creator: Fiona Geiran

item.title: North America poised for light display of aurora borealis
item.description: The splashy nighttime phenomenon will be best observed on Saturday and Sunday nights
item.content:encoded:
The splashy nighttime phenomenon will be best observed on Saturday and Sunday nights

(Image credit: Charlie Riedel)
item.dc:creator: Alana Wise

item.title: Historic U.S. Brig Niagara replica completes a $5 million overhaul
item.description: A replica of the historic USS Niagara — the two-masted warship that helped secure the Great Lakes during the War of 1812 — is back in the water after a costly refit.
item.content:encoded: A replica of the historic USS Niagara — the two-masted warship that helped secure the Great Lakes during the War of 1812 — is back in the water after a costly refit.
item.dc:creator: Scott Neuman

item.title: The townspeople of Vilseck, Germany, worry that Trump may pull out 5,000 U.S. troops
item.description: President Trump's troop withdrawal threat rattles residents of a small Bavarian town reliant on U.S. military personnel and their families for both income and friendships built over decades.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's troop withdrawal threat rattles residents of a small Bavarian town reliant on U.S. military personnel and their families for both income and friendships built over decades.

(Image credit: Lisi Niesner)
item.dc:creator: Rob Schmitz

item.title: Colleges got more rural students to apply. The challenge is getting them to attend
item.description: Some of the nation's most selective institutions are slowly increasing their rural enrollment with the help of millions of dollars from a rural alumnus of the University of Chicago.
item.content:encoded:
Some of the nation's most selective institutions are slowly increasing their rural enrollment with the help of millions of dollars from a rural alumnus of the University of Chicago.

(Image credit: Lucy Lu)
item.dc:creator: Jon Marcus

item.title: Supreme Court is death knell for Virginia's Democratic-friendly congressional map
item.description: The new map was drawn by Democrats and approved by voters, but Virginia's high court nullified the referendum because lawmakers failed to follow proper procedure to get the issue on the ballot.
item.content:encoded:
The new map was drawn by Democrats and approved by voters, but Virginia's high court nullified the referendum because lawmakers failed to follow proper procedure to get the issue on the ballot.

(Image credit: Andrew Harnik)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: Colorado's Democratic governor will let Trump ally Tina Peters out of prison early
item.description: Gov. Jared Polis' controversial commutation follows a pressure campaign by the Trump administration to free Tina Peters, an ex-county official who was convicted of tampering with election equipment.
item.content:encoded:
Gov. Jared Polis' controversial commutation follows a pressure campaign by the Trump administration to free Tina Peters, an ex-county official who was convicted of tampering with election equipment.

(Image credit: Scott Crabtree)
item.dc:creator: Bente Birkeland

item.title: Shakira returns to official World Cup song duty, this time with Burna Boy
item.description: FIFA's official 2026 World Cup song is "Dai Dai" from Shakira and Burna Boy. There are a number of factors that shape which songs define a tournament — and endure beyond it.
item.content:encoded: FIFA's official 2026 World Cup song is "Dai Dai" from Shakira and Burna Boy. There are a number of factors that shape which songs define a tournament — and endure beyond it.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman
